overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a covered night market street with neon-lit food stalls. The player approaches vendors cooking at noodle and grill stalls in a cyberpunk urban setting with holographic advertisements and industrial architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market street approaching the food stalls

wooden food stall counter with cooking equipment

stainless steel cooking station with utensils
illuminated digital screen displaying menu items

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered cyberpunk night market corridor with industrial metal roofing and neon signage. The noodle stall counter becomes visible on the left with green illuminated stools, while holographic billboards glow in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: noodle stall cooking station with steam and heat lamps

events.description: steam from the cooking wok becomes prominent as the camera approaches the vendor

agents.ego_description: approaching the noodle stall and observing the vendor cooking with a large wok

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing a white hat stirring noodles in a large steaming wok

entered.detail: large metal wok emitting thick steam with noodles being stir-fried
metal spatulas and cooking tools hanging at the stall
prepared plates of noodles waiting on the counter
white refrigerated container with orange branding
industrial metal rack with storage containers

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the noodle stall closely, where a vendor stir-fries noodles in a steaming wok. Steam fills the air as the camera moves past the cooking station, with prepared plates of noodles and an All Foods cooler visible on the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: market corridor transitioning between food stalls with view of open street

events.description: moving past the noodle stall into the open market area with the grill stall coming into view

agents.ego_description: walking past the noodle vendor toward the illuminated grill stall deeper in the market

entered.detail: food stall with illuminated grilling equipment and digital displays
red and cyan lit grill surface with food cooking
trees with pink illuminated blossoms visible in the background
high-rise cyberpunk buildings with lit windows
bright red automated vending kiosk with illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the noodle stall into a wider market corridor where a grill stall with illuminated cooking surfaces becomes visible. Cherry blossom trees and tall cyberpunk buildings appear in the background as the camera advances toward the next vendor.

scene_state.functional_zone: grill stall with female vendor and approaching police officer

events.description: police officer enters the frame and walks toward the grill stall

agents.ego_description: standing at the grill stall observing the female vendor cooking and watching the approaching officer

notable_agents.action: female vendor grilling food on an illuminated red and cyan lit grill surface
police officer in NCPD tactical gear walking toward the stall

segments.scene_description: The player arrives at the grill stall where a female vendor cooks on an illuminated surface. A police officer in tactical gear approaches the stall from the background, walking toward the camera as the scene ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit night market, moving from a narrow industrial corridor toward an open plaza of food stalls. It begins by walking under metal roofing past glowing holographic billboards and green illuminated stools, gradually drawing closer to a noodle stall. As the camera reaches the counter, the view passes through clouds of steam rising from a stir-fry wok and an All Foods cooler before emerging into a wider market corridor. The scene then expands to reveal cherry blossom trees and towering cyberpunk architecture in the background as the camera advances toward a grill stall with illuminated cooking surfaces. Finally, the movement settles at the grill where a female vendor is cooking, just as a tactical police officer approaches from the distance.
